sections.heading: Pediatric Cancer Basics
sections.body: A pediatric cancer diagnosis can feel overwhelming. It is normal to feel confused, scared, or unsure where to start.

sections.heading: What Caregivers Should Know
sections.body: You are not expected to remember everything. Questions are always appropriate. Your care team wants you to ask for clarification.

sections.heading: When to Call the Care Team
sections.body: Call your care team right away for fever, changes in behavior, or concerns that worry you.
